nasb.text: And her spirit returned, and she got up immediately; and He gave orders for something to be given her to eat.

esv.text: And her spirit returned, and she got up at once. And he directed that something should be given her to eat.

cnv.text: 她的靈魂回來了，她就立刻起來。耶穌吩咐給她東西吃。

ccb.text: 她的灵魂就回来了，她立刻站了起来。耶稣吩咐人给她东西吃。

csbs.text: 于是她的灵魂回来了，她就立刻起来。耶稣吩咐给她吃东西。
